MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Set For Case Management Conference On Apr-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to the hearing counsel for Plaintiff and Defense appear. The court did not receive any notice to contest the TR. Parties confirm they did not receive any notice to contest. The clerk reminds parties of the submission of the proposed order per the TR.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, NA's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Prior to the hearing, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-02-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
